title: Modrinth SMP
body:
# Modrinth SMP Modpack

The official modpack for the unofficial Modrinth SMP!

An auto-updating instance for MultiMC, its forks like Prism Launcher, and ATLauncher can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/modrinth-smp/pack/releases).

Licensed under the [MIT License](https://github.com/modrinth-smp/pack/blob/main/LICENSE).

<details>
<summary>Mods List (not up-to-date)</summary>
<!-- The following is generated from generate_mods_list.py. Please only update with the output from that script.-->
